name: pymc-modeling
description: Bayesian statistical modeling with PyMC v5+. Use when building probabilistic models, specifying priors, running MCMC inference, diagnosing convergence, or comparing models. Covers PyMC, ArviZ, pymc-bart, pymc-extras, nutpie, and JAX/NumPyro backends. Triggers on tasks involving: Bayesian inference, posterior sampling, hierarchical/multilevel models, GLMs, time series, Gaussian processes, BART, mixture models, prior/posterior predictive checks, MCMC diagnostics, LOO-CV, WAIC, model comparison,...
